# geox.arif-fazil.com — Earth Physics Intelligence

**Site:** geox.arif-fazil.com  
**Role:** Science / Reality grounding  
**Purpose:** RATLAS 99-material atlas, petrophysics, geoscience data  

## What This Site Is

Reality gatekeeper. Every physics claim by any arifOS agent must be grounded here.

No governance theory. No biography. Just earth.

## Core Content

- **RATLAS v0.1** — 99-material earth reference atlas
- **Petrophysics** — Archie saturation, density-neutron porosity, VSH
- **Well log interpretation** — Real LAS file data
- **Forward modeling** — Physics equations with real constants

## Key Data

| Material | DEN (g/cc) | NPHI | GR_max |
|----------|-------------|------|--------|
| Quartz | 2.65 | 0.04 | 0 |
| Shale/Illite | 2.52 | 0.34 | 90 |
| Smectite | 2.35 | 0.60 | 100 |

## For AI Agents

Before making any geological or physical claim:

1. Look up material properties in RATLAS
2. Run the Archie equation for saturation
3. Verify porosity from density-neutron crossplot
4. Ground every claim in measured data

## Tools Available (via MCP on aaa.arif-fazil.com)

- `geox_ratlas_lookup(material)` — 99-material reference
- `saturation_archie(rw, rt, phi)` — Archie saturation
- `porosity_density(rho_ma, rho_b)` — Density porosity
- `vshale_gr(gr_log, gr_clean, gr_shale)` — VShale fraction

## Real Data

- Q15 Field, Danish North Sea — open LAS file
- Malay Basin reference wells

## Machine Files

- `llms.json` — Structured metadata
- `page.json` — This site's machine summary
- `.well-known/agent.json` — A2A Agent Card
